MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description, or PAD, is a data set that is used by shareware authors to disseminate information to anyone interested in their software products.

Program_Info.Program_System_Requirements: macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later, Apple Silicon or Intel Mac

English.Keywords: mac automation, rpa, macos, browser automation, web scraping, playwright, excel automation, no-code, visual programming, block editor, ai automation, ocr, macro recorder, productivity, task automation, workflow automation
English.Char_Desc_45: Professional RPA automation tool for macOS
English.Char_Desc_80: The first professional RPA tool built natively for macOS with AI and Playwright
English.Char_Desc_250: RocketMouse AI is the first professional RPA tool built natively for macOS. Automate browser tasks, Excel data entry, file management, and more with a visual block editor. Features AI macro generation, Playwright browser automation, and OCR.
English.Char_Desc_450: RocketMouse AI is the first professional RPA tool built natively for macOS. Automate browser tasks, Excel data entry, file management, and more with a visual block editor — no coding required. Features AI macro generation, Playwright-powered browser automation, OCR, and 169+ built-in operations across 24 categories. Includes dual recording modes, visual element picker, breakpoints, step execution, variable watch, and cross-platform .rmproj file compatibility with Windows.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
RocketMouse AI is the most powerful visual RPA automation tool ever built for macOS. Snap color-coded blocks together to automate anything on your Mac — from browser tasks and Excel spreadsheets to file operations and screen recognition. No coding required.
Key Features: - 169+ Operations across 24 categories (Mouse, Keyboard, Browser, Excel, File, AI, Vision, and more) - AI Assistant — Describe your workflow in plain English; AI generates the macro instantly (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Groq) - Browser Automation — Playwright + Chrome built in. Navigate, click, fill forms, extract data. Visual element picker for CSS/XPath selectors - Dual Recording — Input Recording (mouse + keyboard across any app) and Browser Recording (auto-captures Chrome interactions) - Vision and OCR — Apple Vision-powered image recognition, template matching, and text extraction - Excel — 18 spreadsheet operations, native file read/write - Debug Tools — Breakpoints, step execution, variable watch, DryRun mode, speed control (0.1x-5.0x) - Cross-Platform — .rmproj files are fully compatible between macOS and Windows
Built with Swift, designed for dark mode, Apple Notarized. Free 15-day trial.

Permissions.Distribution_Permissions: Free to distribute the unmodified trial version.
